addrmap irqctrlvec {
   reg {
      desc = "Interrupt Mask and Priority";
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved1[0:0];
      field {
         desc = "Indicates if an interrupt is masked (bit=0) or enabled (bit=1)";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
         reset = 15'h0;
      } imask[15:1];
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved2[16:16];
      field {
         desc = "Indicates if an interrupt belongs to priority level 1 (bit=1) or 0 (bit=0)";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } ilevel[31:17];
   } interrupMaskandPriorityLevel @0x0;
   reg {
      desc = "Indicates if an interrupt is pending";
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved1[0:0];
      field {
         desc = "Indicates if an interrupt is pending (bit=1)";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } ipend[15:1];
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved2[31:16];
   } interruptPendingRegister @0x4;
   reg {
      desc = "Indicates if an interrupt is being forced";
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved1[0:0];
      field {
         desc = "Indicates if an interrupt is being forced (bit=1)";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } iforce[15:1];
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved2[31:16];
   } interruptForceRegister @0x8;
   reg {
      desc = "If written with a '1', will clear corresponding bit(s) in interrupt pending register. A read returns 0.";
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved1[0:0];
      field {
         desc = "If written with a '1', will clear corresponding bit(s) in interrupt pending register. A read returns 0.";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } iforce[15:1];
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } Reserved2[31:16];
   } interruptClearRegister @0xc;
   reg {
      desc = "interruptReadClearPendingRegister";
      field {
         desc = "interruptReadClearPendingRegister";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } interruptReadClearPendingRegister[31:0];
   } interruptReadClearPendingRegister @0x10;
};

                              (constant_expression
                                (constant_primary
                                  (primary_literal
                                    (number))))))))))
                  (component_body_elem
                    (component_def
                      (component_anon_def
                        (component_type
                          (component_primary_type))
                        (component_body
                          (component_body_elem
                            (explicit_component_inst
                              (id
                                (id_start))
                              (component_insts
                                (component_inst
                                  (constant_expression
                                    (constant_primary
                                      (primary_literal
                                        (string_literal))))))))
                          (component_body_elem
                            (property_assignment
                              (explicit_or_default_prop_assignment
                                (explicit_prop_assignment
                                  (prop_assignment_lhs
                                    (prop_keyword))
                                  (prop_assignment_rhs
                                    (constant_expression
                                      (constant_primary
                                        (primary_literal
                                          (accesstype_literal)))))))))

                            (property_assignment
                              (explicit_or_default_prop_assignment
                                (explicit_prop_assignment
                                  (prop_assignment_lhs
                                    (prop_keyword))
                                  (prop_assignment_rhs
                                    (constant_expression
                                      (constant_primary
                                        (primary_literal
                                          (accesstype_literal)))))))))))
                      (component_insts
                        (component_inst
                          (id
                            (id_start))
                          (component_inst_array_or_range
                            (range
                              (constant_expression
                                (constant_primary
                                  (primary_literal
                                    (number))))
                              (constant_expression
                                (constant_primary
                                  (primary_literal
                                    (number))))))))))))

                        (number))))))))
